misc: Has a habit of getting lost on golf course grounds
Does not spit in the glass
biography: Janne, representing Revontuli Golf, has established himself as a dedicated participant in the Hector Trophée. His consistent presence across eight previous editions of this esteemed pair competition speaks to an enduring commitment to the greens. While his absence from the forthcoming Hector Trophée 2026 is noted, his legacy of participation remains a significant chapter in the tournament's history.

Throughout his numerous appearances, Janne has navigated the intricate challenges of both individual and team play with unwavering resolve. Despite his earnest and persistent efforts, the ultimate accolades, neither the coveted Hector Trophée for the victorious pair nor the prestigious Victor Trophy for individual supremacy, have yet adorned his competitive record. His journey, marked by consistent engagement, highlights a persistent pursuit of these distinguished honors.

Beyond his competitive drive, Janne is recognized for a truly distinctive approach to the game. He possesses a peculiar habit of navigating the course with such profound absorption that he has, on occasion, found himself in unexpected corners of the grounds, a charming eccentricity that endears him to fellow competitors. This amiable disposition extends to his interactions, where his generous spirit is frequently observed. Furthermore, Janne approaches the game with an unvarnished honesty, a trait often encapsulated by the adage that he "does not spit in the glass," signifying his direct and unpretentious engagement with every aspect of the competition.
